description: SMTP-to-Email bridge. Receives email through the UnitySVC SMTP gateway and forwards the faithful, lossless email envelope (`from`, `to`, `subject`, `text_body`, `html_body`, headers, attachments, spf/dkim) as an HTTP POST to the customer's own HTTP endpoint. Useful for integrating email-based triggers into internal webhooks, Zapier-style automations, or any HTTP receiver. The upstream URL is resolved from the customer secret `HTTP_RELAY_BASE_URL`; if the receiver requires auth, set `HTTP_RELAY_API_KEY` (forwarded as `Authorization: Bearer`).
name: smtp-to-email

payout_price.description: Free — customer provides own HTTP receiver
